specs.title: cp-000: Backward references fetched via S2 API
cp-001: Rate-limited with delays between requests
cp-002: Converts S2 format to unified result format
cp-003: Uses getSmallModel to extract structured data from abstracts
cp-004: Study design
cp-005: Sample size
cp-006: Effect sizes
cp-007: P-values
cp-008: Population characteristics
cp-009: Follow-up duration
cp-010: Key findings
cp-011: Conservative extraction no speculation on missing data
cp-012: Downloads open-access PDFs
cp-013: Extracts Results and Discussion sections
cp-014: Falls back to the pre-references full text when section headers are missing but
cp-015: Max file size 20 MB
cp-016: Timeout 15 seconds
cp-017: Pass 1 Per-perspective narrative sections parallel execution
cp-018: Pass 2 Executive summary and introduction
cp-019: Pass 3 Comparison tables gaps contradictions conclusions
cp-020: Pass 4 Self-critique and revision
cp-021: Outputs markdown with interactive citation markers N
cp-022: Topic 5 characters the plan route emits an SSE error and the page shows the erro
cp-023: Topic 500 characters the plan route emits an SSE error and the page shows the er
cp-024: Empty topic Start button disabled
cp-025: Fetch failures caught and displayed
cp-026: AbortError handled silently expected from Stop button
cp-027: Non-AbortError shows error state with message
cp-028: Red AlertCircle icon
cp-029: Heading Research Failed
cp-030: Error message text displayed
cp-031: Try Again button returns to idle state
cp-032: Plan generation failure shows error and allows retry
cp-033: Execute failure shows error with context
cp-034: Save failure shows error tooltip on button
